'''âd-n-s-h''' ('''kadansehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xbreed|xbreed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xbreed|xbreed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-n-s-h
|-
! Lemma
| kadansehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidansehoko|thidansehoko]] || [[word:jidansehoko|jidansehoko]] || [[word:shidansehoko|shidansehoko]] || [[word:kidansehoko|kidansehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudansehoko|thuthudansehoko]] || [[word:jujudansehoko|jujudansehoko]] || [[word:shushudansehoko|shushudansehoko]] || [[word:kukudansehoko|kukudansehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodansehoko|thodansehoko]] || [[word:jodansehoko|jodansehoko]] || [[word:shodansehoko|shodansehoko]] || [[word:kodansehoko|kodansehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdansehoko|thĂŠdansehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdansehoko|jĂŠdansehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdansehoko|shĂŠdansehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdansehoko|kĂŠdansehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadansehoko|thathadansehoko]] || [[word:jajadansehoko|jajadansehoko]] || [[word:shashadansehoko|shashadansehoko]] || [[word:kakadansehoko|kakadansehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadansehoko|thadansehoko]] || [[word:jadansehoko|jadansehoko]] || [[word:shadansehoko|shadansehoko]] || [[word:kadansehoko|kadansehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadansehoko|thadansehoko]] || [[word:jadansehoko|jadansehoko]] || [[word:shadansehoko|shadansehoko]] || [[word:kadansehoko|kadansehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
